subcodes.first_line: The greatest of divine bestowals is that thou shouldst open thy tongue to the guidance of the people, shouldst not rest, and according to thy capacity spread the divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اعظم مواهب الهیّه آنست که لسان بهدایت خلق بگشائی و نیاسائی و بقدر قوّه نشر نفحات الهی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @exhortations and counsels, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
